footer.tagline: The reference for legal services in Tunisia. Verified lawyers, simplified appointments.

homepage.title: Find and book a [[verified]] lawyer in Tunisia.
homepage.subtitle: Initial consultations with lawyers certified by the ONAT. Direct payment to the firm — no commission, no advertising
homepage.verifiedDesc: All lawyers are reviewed and verified before listing.
homepage.bookingDesc: Pick a slot and confirm — it's quick and secure.
homepage.communicationDesc: Encrypted messages and secure video consultations.
homepage.testimonial: "Juridika helped me find the right lawyer in under 10 minutes. Booking was seamless."

clients.title: A platform designed for everyone
clients.subtitle: Whether you are an individual, a business, or a Tunisian living abroad, Juridika.tn meets your specific legal needs.

particuliers.title: Individuals
particuliers.desc: First employment contract, marriage, divorce, rental disputes, inheritance. Access legal expertise without traditional barriers.

pme.title: SMEs & Start-ups
pme.desc: Company formation, commercial contracts, HR management, debt recovery. Find the expert suited to your sector.

diaspora.title: Tunisian Diaspora
diaspora.desc: Manage your affairs in Tunisia from abroad — real estate, inheritance, investment. Multilingual interface, automatic time zones.

trust.title: Trust as a foundation
trust.subtitle: The legal sector demands absolute trust. Our verification process ensures that every professional on Juridika is certified, compliant, and trustworthy.
trust.cardDesc: Every registered lawyer is verified through the records of the National Bar Association of Tunisia before their profile is activated.

step1.title: ONAT Verification
step1.desc: Bar card, diploma and license checked before any profile activation.

step2.title: Regular monitoring
step2.desc: Periodic document updates to ensure every lawyer is still in practice.

step3.title: Fast reporting
step3.desc: Any reported issue is handled within 24h. Non-compliant profiles are suspended immediately.

items.q: Why do I need to create a profile to book?
items.a: The profile guarantees your security and the lawyer's, enables appointment reminders, ensures exchange traceability, and protects the confidentiality of your information.

items.q: Does Juridika.tn take a commission on my fees?
items.a: No. Never. You pay directly at the lawyer's office. Juridika operates solely on subscriptions for professionals — no cut of fees, ever.

items.q: What is the difference between an orientation consultation and representation?
items.a: An orientation consultation helps you understand your legal situation, rights, and available options. Legal representation — pleading on your behalf, drafting legal acts — requires a separate fee agreement concluded directly with the lawyer.

items.q: How can I cancel or reschedule an appointment?
items.a: From your client portal, up to 24 hours before the appointment. A notification is sent to the lawyer immediately.
Yes. All data is encrypted and stored in compliance with Tunisian data protection legislation. Juridika never shares your information with third parties for commercial purposes.

items.q: I'm abroad — can I consult via video call?
items.a: Yes. Lawyers subscribed to the Professional plan offer video consultations. Filter results by 'Video available' when searching.

pricing.title: Grow your practice with Juridika
pricing.subtitle: No commission on your fees. A fixed subscription. A verified professional showcase and a peer collaboration network.

urgence.title: Emergency lawyer, available now
urgence.desc: Police custody, overnight dispute, commercial incident, business travel. On-call lawyers are accepting referrals right now. Client profile required.
urgence.note: Referral only · Payment directly to the firm

diaspora.title: Manage your affairs in Tunisia from anywhere
diaspora.subtitle: Juridika.tn is designed for Tunisians living abroad who need to handle legal matters in Tunisia remotely.

langues.title: 5-language interface
langues.desc: Arabic, French, English, Italien, German. Consult in the language most natural to you.

fuseaux.title: Automatic time zones
fuseaux.desc: Availability is displayed in your time zone. No confusion when booking.

checklists.title: Pre-consultation checklists
checklists.desc: Documents to prepare based on your case type — real estate, inheritance, company formation.

video.title: Video consultation
video.desc: Meet your lawyer without traveling. Available with Professional-tier lawyers.

processus.title: Book a consultation in 5 simple steps
processus.subtitle: A clear, transparent process designed to respect your time and confidentiality.

step1.title: Create your profile
step1.desc: Name, email, phone, preferred language and consents. Less than 3 minutes.

step2.title: Search
step2.desc: Filter by specialty, governorate and language. All results are verified.

step3.title: Choose
step3.desc: Neutral ranking by availability and proximity. No lawyer pays to appear first.

step4.title: Book
step4.desc: In-person, phone or video conference. Confirmation D-1 and H-3.

step5.title: Pay directly
step5.desc: Fees paid directly to the firm. Juridika takes no commission.
